haiku:
Warm crust hugs sweet blue,
Fields burst forth with laughter's cheer,
A slice of pure joy.
Happy #NationalBlueberryPieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Capes flutter like dreams,
Laughter sparks in sunlit skies,
Heroes rise with hope.
Happy #NationalSuperheroDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunlight spills like gold,
Laughter twirls through the air,
Joy blooms in each heart.
#HappyBirthdayHarperLee from @ClamBakeSanta

Feasts of joy unite.
Happy #NationalShrimpScampiDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Colors swirl in joyous flight,
Laughter fills the air.
Happy #WorldDanceDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Moonlight on the keys.
#HappyBirthdayDukeEllington from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter wraps the warm evening,
Dreams take flight on wings.
#HappyBirthdayWilliamRandolphHearst from @ClamBakeSanta

Rhythms pulse in warm twilight,
Hearts sway, spirits rise.
Happy #InternationalJazzDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Colors burst like joyous blooms,

#HappyBirthdayWalterLantz from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter twirls through the soft breeze,
Together we bloom.
Happy #MayDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joy in every bite.
Happy #NationalMacaroonDay from @ClamBakeSanta

#HappyBirthdayMotherJones from @ClamBakeSanta

Joy in every bite.
Happy #NationalTruffleDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Whiskers twitch with glee.
Happy #NationalFerretDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the room,
Velvet voices intertwine,
Joy's sweet serenade.
#HappyBirthdayBingCrosby from @ClamBakeSanta

Happy #NationalRaspberryTartDay from @ClamBakeSanta
